Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
120 
PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID 
LABEL: 
Provider Number Issuing Entity Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the entity which issued the provider identification number that is captured in the 
PRVDR_NUM data element. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
18 
FILE(S): 
APR Identifiers 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider
